title: RepoAnalyzer v2: estructura, riesgos y salud del repositorio
wave: Ola 4 — Repo intelligence y revisión industrial

architectural_decision.reason: FUNC-SPRINT-37 agrega un analizador local read-only que integra motores ya existentes y el DependencyGraph de FUNC-SPRINT-36. No introduce dependencias externas, red, APIs, modelos, UI, sandbox, patch apply, Git write ni ejecución de código analizado.

pass_criteria: RepoAnalyzer consolidates RepoInventory, DependencyGraph and GitAdapter signals.
The command returns CommandResult and supports --json/--write-report.
Runtime folders are excluded from analysis.
Repositories without Git produce partial controlled analysis instead of crashing.
Secret-like content is not emitted as raw payload.
MIASI declares repo.analyze as a read-only tool.
block_criteria: The analyzer mixes outputs runtime into repository health.
A missing Git repository breaks the analysis.
The analyzer executes/imports code under analysis.
Sprint 37 is documented as SAST/SCA or industrial certification.
Patch apply, Git write, refactor execution or deploy are enabled.
risks: Health score is heuristic and may be overinterpreted.
Modules-without-tests heuristic can generate false positives.
TODO/FIXME scan is textual and bounded.
